name: @radzor/file-upload
description: Server-side file upload to S3-compatible storage, Cloudflare R2, or local disk. Includes MIME validation, size limits, pre-signed URL generation, and AWS v4 signing.

inputs.name: bucket
inputs.description: S3/R2 bucket name. Required for s3 and r2 providers.

inputs.name: accessKeyId
inputs.description: AWS/R2 access key ID. Required for s3 and r2 providers.

inputs.name: secretAccessKey
inputs.description: AWS/R2 secret access key. Required for s3 and r2 providers.

inputs.name: endpoint
inputs.description: Custom S3-compatible endpoint URL. Required for R2.

inputs.name: localDir
inputs.description: Local directory for file storage (local provider only).

inputs.name: allowedMimeTypes
inputs.description: Allowed MIME types. Defaults to common image, document, and archive types.

inputs.name: pathPrefix
inputs.description: Prefix prepended to all storage paths (e.g. 'uploads/').

outputs.name: uploadResult
outputs.description: Upload result with id, url, path, size, mimeType, and originalName.

events.name: onProgress
events.description: Fired during upload with progress information.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired when upload fails (invalid MIME type, file too large, storage error).

actions.name: upload

params.name: data
params.description: File data as Buffer, Web ReadableStream, or Node.js Readable.

params.name: options
params.description: Original file name and MIME type.

actions.description: Upload a file to the configured storage backend.

params.name: path
params.description: Storage path of the file to delete.

actions.name: getPresignedUrl
actions.returns: Promise<{ url: string; fields: Record<string, string>; path: string }>
actions.description: Generate a pre-signed URL for direct browser upload (S3/R2 only).

llm.constraints: Node.js only (uses fs, crypto, stream modules). For S3/R2, requires access key credentials. Local provider creates directories automatically.
